title: Monterey, CA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Monterey, CA: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Monterey is a city in CA with a population of 28,000. Historic coastal city with Cannery Row, the Monterey Bay Aquarium, and Pebble Beach.
